cookiesPage.title: Tsunonton Cookie Policy Essential TON GameFi Storage
cookiesPage.quote: "No ad trackers. Only the essentials needed to keep the experience smooth across the site and game."
cookiesPage.intro: We keep your Tsunonton experience clean, community-first, and transparent. For more details on how we handle data, see the Privacy Policy and Risk Disclaimer.
cookiesPage.legalNotice: Legal Notice: This page explains essential storage only and is not legal advice. We may update storage practices as the app evolves.
cookiesPage.summaryText: We only store the minimum needed for the Tsunonton website and Telegram mini-app to work: theme preference, consent, and secure session checks. No ad trackers. No cross-site profiling to our knowledge.
cookiesPage.controlsText: You can clear cookies and localStorage anytime in your browser. Some features may break if you block essential storage.
cookiesPage.sec1Text: Tsunonton ($TSUN) uses minimal essential browser storage (cookies and Web Storage like localStorage) to ensure functionality and improve user experience across the website and Telegram GameFi mini-app.
cookiesPage.sec2Text: We aim for a no-tracking policy. We do not use third-party tracking, analytics, or marketing cookies on this site.
cookiesPage.sec2Item1: Theme Preference: The main site stores a theme value (e.g., "dark" or "light") to persist your preferred visual theme across pages.
cookiesPage.sec2Item2: Authentication & Validation: We may use localized storage combined with Telegram initialization data to securely process actions, wallet linkages, and game updates without maintaining server-side user mapping.
cookiesPage.sec2Item3: Cookie Consent: A simple acknowledgement indicating you have read the cookie banner.
cookiesPage.sec3Text1: Because our stored properties are essential for core visual functions and decentralized connectivity, attempting to disable or block them may result in unpredictable and deteriorated functionality.
cookiesPage.sec3Text2: However, you may choose to control or clear localStorage and cookies manually via your web browser settings at any point:
cookiesPage.sec4Text: By continuing to use the Tsunonton application or website, you acknowledge our use of strictly necessary storage properties as described in this policy. Where required by law, we request consent via the banner.
cookiesPage.sec5Text: Questions about cookies or storage? Ask in our community chat or review the Knowledge Base. We keep policies public and community-reviewed.

privacyPage.title: Tsunonton Privacy Policy Minimal Data, Maximum Respect
privacyPage.quote: "It's not like we want your data anyway, b-baka! We aim to collect only the minimum needed to make the game work. Don't get the wrong idea!"
privacyPage.legalNotice: Legal Notice: This policy is informational and may be updated. It is not legal advice. If you have questions about your rights, contact us.
privacyPage.sec1Text: Welcome to the Tsunonton Project, a community-operated decentralized GameFi ecosystem on the TON blockchain. We do not operate a centralized data brokerage. The Data Controller (legal term) is the community-operated project, and we coordinate through our official Telegram @TsunOnTON for privacy questions.
privacyPage.sec2Title: 2. The Minimal Data We Collect (Really, That's It!)
privacyPage.sec2Text: Unlike those creepy corporate overlords, we do not collect your real name or your dog's birthday. To power our Telegram Mini App & TON GameFi mechanics, we collect only:
privacyPage.sec2Item1: Telegram User ID: Your unique Telegram ID for saving in-game progression and account integrity.
privacyPage.sec2Item2: TON Wallet Address: Only when you actively connect it, so we can enable optional on-chain features and community rewards. Rewards, if any, are discretionary and not guaranteed.
privacyPage.sec2Item3: Theme Preference: A basic string stored locally in your browser (LocalStorage) to keep your chosen theme.
privacyPage.sec2Text2: We do not knowingly collect data from children. The services are intended for users 18+.

riskPage.title: Risk & Investment Disclaimer Please Read Carefully
riskPage.quote: "Crypto assets are volatile. Only participate if you understand the risks and accept full responsibility."
riskPage.legalNotice: Legal Notice: This page is informational and not legal, financial, or tax advice. Market conditions and regulatory guidance can change at any time.
riskPage.sec1Text: Tsun On TON ($TSUN) is a utility/meme token designed for entertainment purposes within the Tsun On TON GameFi ecosystem. It is explicitly not a financial instrument, security, share, or equity, and it has no guaranteed utility or functionality.
riskPage.sec2Title: 2. No Intrinsic Value or Guaranteed Return
riskPage.sec2Text: The $TSUN token holds no intrinsic or underlying value and makes no promises or guarantees of financial returns, rewards, or price appreciation. No statements made by the project should be construed as financial advice.
riskPage.sec3Title: 3. High Volatility & Risk of Total Loss
riskPage.sec3Text: Cryptocurrency investments are highly volatile and inherently risky. By purchasing $TSUN, engaging with the project, or playing the game, you assume the risk of partial or total loss of funds. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Smart contracts may contain bugs or vulnerabilities, and blockchain transactions are irreversible.
riskPage.sec4Text: Tsun On TON, its developers, and community managers do not provide investment, legal, or tax advice. All purchasing, holding, or trading decisions are made completely at the user's own risk. If you are uncertain about participating, consult qualified professionals.
riskPage.sec5Text1: Under no circumstances will the Tsun On TON project team, affiliates, or contributors be held liable for any direct, indirect, consequential, or other losses or damages incurred as a result of relying on any information provided or from interacting with the $TSUN token.
riskPage.sec5Text2: Regulatory changes, tax obligations, and jurisdictional restrictions may affect access to services, token availability, or token treatment. You are responsible for compliance in your jurisdiction.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service Please Read Carefully
termsPage.quote: "These rules keep the community safe and the game fair. If you use the services, you agree to them."
termsPage.legalNotice: Legal Notice: This page is informational and not legal advice. These terms may be updated at any time.
termsPage.sec1Text: By accessing the Tsun On TON website, using the Telegram Mini-App, or interacting with the $TSUN token (collectively, the "Services"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. You must be at least 18 years old or the legal age of majority in your jurisdiction to use these Services.
termsPage.sec2Text: Tsun On TON ($TSUN) is an entertainment-focused GameFi ecosystem and meme token operating on the TON blockchain. The $TSUN token has no intrinsic value, is not a financial instrument, and guarantees no financial return. The ecosystem is designed for community engagement and may change or be discontinued at any time.
termsPage.sec3Text1: The content provided on this website, in our Telegram bot, and in any related communications is for informational and entertainment purposes only. It does not constitute financial, investment, legal, or tax advice. The Tsun On TON team is not a registered financial advisor, and nothing on this site should be interpreted as a recommendation to buy, sell, or hold any cryptocurrency or token. Any statements about potential value or future plans are forward-looking and subject to change without notice.
termsPage.sec3Text2: You acknowledge that any decision to acquire $TSUN tokens or participate in the game is made solely by you, based on your own assessment of the risks and merits. We strongly encourage you to do your own research (DYOR) and consult with a qualified professional before engaging with any crypto asset.
termsPage.sec4Text: Engaging with decentralized applications (dApps) and cryptocurrencies involves significant risks. By using our Services, you explicitly acknowledge and assume all risks, including but not limited to volatility of the asset, technological vulnerabilities, smart contract bugs, regulatory changes, and complete loss of funds. You are solely responsible for securing your private keys and wallets.
termsPage.sec5Text1: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the Tsun On TON team, its developers, associates, and affiliates shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or exemplary damages, including but not limited to financial losses, loss of profits, loss of data, or damages resulting from your use or inability to use the Services or interact with the $TSUN token.
termsPage.sec5Text2: The code and smart contracts are provided "as is" and "as available," without warranty of any kind, express or implied.
termsPage.sec6Text: These Terms of Service and any separate agreements whereby we provide you Services shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Norway and applicable regulations of the European Economic Area (EEA), including alignment with MiCA (Markets in Crypto-Assets) standards where applicable, to the extent permitted by law. Any disputes arising out of these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Norway.
termsPage.sec7Text: We reserve the right to amend or modify these terms at any time without prior notice. Continuous use of the Services implies your acceptance of any changes.

knowledgePage.title: Tsunonton Knowledge Base TON GameFi & Telegram Guide
knowledgePage.intro1: "New to crypto or TON? Don't worry - I've put together this simple Tsunonton guide. It's not like I want you to succeed or anything... b-baka! Just read it carefully and don't make any silly mistakes!"
knowledgePage.intro2: Built by a community-first team. On-chain status (including contract renounce or locks) should always be verified independently. Before you play or swap, review our Risk Disclaimer and Privacy Policy.
knowledgePage.legalNotice: Legal Notice: This guide is educational and for entertainment only. It is not financial, investment, legal, or tax advice. Crypto assets are high risk and can lose all value.
knowledgePage.quickStartText: Set up a TON wallet, grab a small amount of TON for gas, and swap on STON.fi. Then explore the Tsunonton game to collect Tsun Points (in-game only).
knowledgePage.checklist1: Verify the official contract on Tonviewer.
knowledgePage.checklist2: Ignore DMs and use only tsunonton.com links.
knowledgePage.checklist3: Keep your seed phrase private, always.

01.title: 01 What is a Blockchain in GameFi?
01.text: Think of a blockchain like a digital ledger or a shared notebook that everyone can see but no single person can erase or alter. Once information (like a transaction) is written into it, it's there forever.
01.list1: Decentralisation: No central authority (like a bank) controls it. It's maintained by a global network of computers.
01.list2: Transparency: Anyone can view the transactions on public block explorers.
01.list3: Immutability: Data cannot be changed once confirmed.

02.title: 02 What is the TON Blockchain (The Open Network)?
02.text: TON is a fast, highly scalable blockchain originally designed by the team behind Telegram. It was built to process millions of transactions per second, making it incredibly well-suited for TON GameFi, social apps, and micro-transactions.
02.note: Why we use TON: It offers incredibly low gas fees, near-instant transaction confirmations, and seamless deep integration natively via Telegram's massive ecosystem.

03.title: 03 TON Wallets - Your Digital Pocket
03.text: A crypto wallet doesn't actually store coins; it stores the private keys (the passwords) that prove you own the coins assigned to your address on the blockchain.
03.card1Text: Mobile-first wallet with great UX. Available on iOS and Android.
03.card2Text: Web extension and desktop app, feature-rich and secure.
03.warning: CRITICAL SECURITY WARNING: Never share your 12 or 24-word seed phrase with ANYONE. If someone gets your seed phrase, they have full access to your funds. The Tsun team will NEVER ask for it.

04.title: 04 How to Buy $TSUN on STON.fi (Step-by-Step)
04.prereq: Prerequisites: You must have a TON wallet set up and funded with some TON to cover the gas fee and purchase cost.
04.step1Text: Navigate to the STON.fi $TSUN Swap page.
04.step2Text: Click "Connect Wallet" at the top right. Scan the QR code with Tonkeeper or authorize the prompt in your extension.
04.step3Text: Ensure "TON" is in "You Pay", and "$TSUN" is in "You Receive".
04.step4Text: Enter the amount, hit "Swap", and confirm the transaction in your wallet app.

05.title: 05 What is a DEX on TON? How Swaps Work
05.text: A DEX (Decentralised Exchange) like STON.fi is a platform that allows users to trade cryptocurrencies directly with one another without needing a centralized middleman (like a bank or traditional exchange).
05.sec1Text: Instead of order books, DEXs use liquidity pools. These are massive pots of paired tokens (like TON and $TSUN) locked in a smart contract. When you buy $TSUN with TON, you are adding TON to the pool and taking $TSUN out. This changes the ratio and determines the price.
05.sec2Text: The difference between the expected price of a trade and the executed price. Slippage happens in fast-moving markets when the price shifts while your transaction is processing.
05.sec3Text: A tiny fractional cost paid in TON to process and validate your transaction on the network.

06.title: 06 Understanding Tsunonton Tokenomics
06.text: Our setup aims for community transparency, and key on-chain status should be checked independently.
06.list2: Zero Taxes (0% Buy/Sell): Current on-chain settings show 0% buy/sell tax. Verify status before trading.
06.list3: Renounced Contract: Reported renounce status reduces admin control, but does not eliminate risks or guarantee immutability.
06.list4: Locked Liquidity: Reported liquidity locks reduce some risks but do not guarantee safety or price stability.
06.note: Reminder: $TSUN is a utility/meme token built for entertainment within the GameFi ecosystem. It is not an investment or a financial security, and there are no guarantees of rewards or value.

07.title: 07 Tsun Points vs $TSUN in the Tsunonton Game
07.text: It's critical to understand the distinction between our two systems:
07.card1Text: Virtual in-game scores obtained by tapping the mascot in Telegram. They are entirely centralized to the bot, have no monetary value, and are completely non-tradeable. Built for fun and leaderboards.
07.card2Text: A decentralized cryptocurrency existing on the TON blockchain. It can be bought, sold, and traded publicly on STON.fi via your crypto wallet.
07.note: Note: While Tsun Points may influence future discretionary community airdrops, they cannot be directly converted or withdrawn. Airdrops are not guaranteed.

08.title: 08 How to Play the Telegram Clicker Game Safely
08.text: You can access the Tsunonton game via @tsunonton_bot on Telegram.
08.list1: Connecting your Wallet: The bot may ask you to connect your TON wallet via TON Connect. This protocol securely links your public address to your Telegram ID so we can track leaderboard distributions and potential airdrops.
08.list2: What it CAN DO: Request a cryptographic signature proving you own the wallet.
08.list3: What it CANNOT DO: It cannot access your funds, send transactions on its own, or see your private keys. Every single financial operation on TON requires manual approval inside your wallet app.
08.list4: Data Privacy: We only store your public Telegram ID and your connected public Wallet Address to facilitate game mechanics.

09.title: 09 $TSUN Security Best Practices
09.item1: Verify the Contract: Malicious actors often create fake tokens with the same name. Always ensure you are trading the official address: EQB1oXiTnD34HwdH0L1fiWtKg0XWMD-47t8i933VhUeNDsd_
09.item2: Official Links Only: Only click links sourced directly from tsunonton.com, our verified X account, or official Telegram channel.
09.item3: Ignore Direct Messages (DMs): Admins or Support will NEVER DM you first. Anyone messaging you offering tech support, "double airdrops", or asking you to connect to a "validation portal" is a scammer. Block and report them.
09.item4: Enable 2FA: Ensure Two-Factor Authentication (a cloud password) is enabled on your Telegram app to protect your account from being hijacked.

10.title: 10 TON & GameFi Glossary
10.airdropText: A distribution of cryptocurrency tokens to a large number of wallet addresses, often for free or as a reward for engaging in community tasks.
10.dyorText: "Do Your Own Research". A standard crypto motto reminding users not to blindly trust what others say and verify facts themselves.
10.gasFeeText: A small network transaction fee paid to validators to process operations on the blockchain. On TON, this is paid in TON coin.
10.rugPullText: A scam where developers abandon a project and run away with investors' funds, typically by draining the liquidity pool. Liquidity locks can reduce some risks but do not eliminate all risk.
10.smartContractText: Self-executing code on the blockchain that automatically runs when predetermined conditions are met. Jettons (tokens) on TON are controlled by smart contracts.

knowledgePage.bottomDisclaimer: Disclaimer: This information is provided for educational and entertainment purposes only and does not constitute financial, investment, legal, tax, or technical advice. Always do your own research before interacting with crypto assets.

lines: It's not like I want you to hold me... b-baka!
D-don't get the wrong idea. I just trust TON, okay?
I-I wasn't waiting for you. I just got here first.
Fine. Buy $TSUN if you really want to.
You're late... and still kinda cute. B-baka.
Hmph. If you're here, at least do it properly.
N-not because I care, but the entry looks good today.
Stop refreshing DexScreener. I can see you.
0% tax. You literally have no excuse.
My airdrop is discretionary. Like my smile.
LP locked. Unlike your discipline.
The chart goes up when I allow it.
My feelings? Also locked. LP-style.
Don't you dare sell me!
You held through that dip? ...Fine. Acceptable.
I-it's not like I wanted you to come back or anything...
You tapped me again. I'm not keeping count. It's 47.
Ugh, fine. Have an airdrop. Don't read into it.
I'm not blushing. It's just... warm in here.
You smell like paper hands. Fix that.
Game coming soon. Like my feelings. Don't rush either.
Still here? I've... decided that's fine.
I-I don't need your clicks! ...Okay, maybe a little.
Touch me again and— fine. One more time.
Don't celebrate that green candle. ...Nice candle, though.

about.label: // About
about.title:
The tsundere token
that actually delivers
about.subtitle: $TSUN lives on TON Blockchain and fuses anime culture with real GameFi mechanics. She acts tough  -  the fundamentals are bulletproof. Not that she cares what you think.
about.card1Text: Tap to earn $TSUN in the Telegram mini-app. Climb the leaderboard, complete missions, and qualify for the airdrop  -  all without leaving Telegram.
about.card2Text: Contract renounced. Liquidity locked via TonRaffles. Zero percent tax on all buys and sells. No hidden wallets. No funny business.
about.card3Text: Lightning-fast transactions and native Telegram integration via TON Blockchain. Reach millions of users without leaving the app they already use daily.
about.card4Text: "It's not like I want you to hold my token... b-baka! I just think TON needs more anime culture, that's all. Don't read too much into it."
about.card5Text: Indie project, anonymous team, renounced contract. The roadmap is public, the LP is locked, and the code is verifiable on-chain. No VC. No presale. No BS.
about.card6Text: Top leaderboard players qualify for the Phase 3 $TSUN airdrop. Play free, rank high, earn real tokens. The earlier you start - the better your position.

faq.label: // FAQ
faq.title:
Questions she'd never
answer directly
faq.a1: Tsun On TON ($TSUN) is an anime-themed GameFi and clicker project on the TON blockchain. By interacting with our Telegram bot, you can collect in-game points while joining the community. In-game points are separate from $TSUN and have no financial value.
faq.a2: The contract is renounced  -  meaning no one can change the code. Liquidity is locked via TonRaffles. There's 0% tax. These are standard safety measures. That said, $TSUN is a meme token and all cryptocurrency carries risk. Always do your own research.
faq.a3: Community reports indicate the contract is renounced. You can verify current status on Tonviewer. Renounced contracts reduce admin control but do not eliminate risks like bugs, exploits, or market volatility.
faq.a4: Initial liquidity is reported locked using third-party lockers on the TON network (TonRaffles). Please verify lock status on-chain. Liquidity locks reduce some risks but are not a guarantee against loss.
faq.q5: When does the clicker game launch and how do I qualify for the airdrop?
faq.a5: The clicker mini-app is currently in active development (Phase 2). Launch will be announced via @tsunonton_bot  -  subscribe to get notified. Airdrop eligibility in Phase 3 is based on leaderboard position during the clicker phase. The earlier you start playing, the better your position.
faq.q6: Do I need to hold $TSUN to play the clicker game?
faq.a6: No  -  the clicker game is open to everyone in Telegram. You earn in-game points regardless of whether you hold tokens. However, holding $TSUN may factor into bonus multipliers in later game phases. Details will be confirmed at launch.
faq.q7: Can I earn real money from the game?
faq.a7: No. The game is designed for entertainment. Tsun Points are not money and cannot be exchanged for $TSUN or any other asset at this time. Future airdrops are at the team's discretion.
faq.a8: The crypto market can act like a classic tsundere: harsh one minute, affectionate the next. We embrace that culture with Web3 meme energy plus anime-inspired GameFi aesthetics.
faq.q9: What happens if I connect my wallet?
faq.a9: Connecting a wallet via official TON Connect protocols is standard practice. It can verify on-chain ownership for optional features (like syncing scores or potential rewards). The app cannot execute transactions without your explicit wallet approval.

faq.title: Knowledge Base
faq.description: Everything you need to know about the Tsunonton token, TON GameFi, and the Telegram mini-app, with clear risk context.
faq.a1: Tsun On TON ($TSUN) is an anime-themed GameFi and clicker project on the TON blockchain. It's not like she wants you to buy or anything, b-baka! By interacting with our Telegram bot, you can collect in-game points while joining the community. In-game points are separate from $TSUN and have no financial value.
faq.a2: A common option is STON.fi. Connect your Tonkeeper or MyTonWallet, ensure you have some TON for gas fees, and swap for $TSUN. Always verify the contract address and understand that trading is high risk. For a step-by-step guide, visit our Knowledge Base.
faq.a3: Community reports indicate the contract is renounced. You can verify current status on Tonviewer. Renounced contracts reduce admin control but do not eliminate risks like bugs, exploits, or market volatility.
faq.a4: Initial liquidity is reported locked using third-party lockers on the TON network (TonRaffles). Please verify lock status on-chain. Liquidity locks reduce some risks but are not a guarantee against loss.
faq.a5: Simply open our official Telegram Mini-App on your phone or desktop. Start tapping the tsundere mascot to collect points, level up your stats, invite friends, and climb the leaderboards. Tsun Points you earn are for fun and leaderboard placement - they are not a tradable asset. For more details, consult our Knowledge Base.
faq.a6: The $TSUN airdrop is currently targeted for Q3 2026, subject to change or cancellation. Active players who complete in-game tasks may be considered for a discretionary community reward. Participation does not entitle you to receive tokens.
faq.q6b: Can I earn real money from the game?
faq.a6b: No. The game is designed for entertainment. Tsun Points are not money and cannot be exchanged for $TSUN or any other asset at this time. Future airdrops are at the team's discretion.
faq.q7: What is the total supply and tokenomics?
faq.a7: The total supply is 1,000,000,000 $TSUN tokens, with a current 0% buy/sell tax. The allocation targets are: 40% for game rewards, 24.4% for community initiatives, 17.3% for liquidity, and 18.3% for development and marketing. These figures are illustrative, may change, and do not create any entitlement to distributions.
faq.q8: How is the project protected against rugs?
faq.a8: The project aims to reduce some central-control risks via a reported renounced contract and locked initial liquidity. These measures do not remove market, technical, or operational risks. Read our Risk Disclaimer for more details.
faq.a9: The crypto market is harsh - it treats you terribly before randomly showing affection with massive green candles. That's the textbook definition of a Tsundere! We embraced this culture by mixing Web3 meme energy with engaging anime P2E aesthetics.
faq.q10: What happens if I connect my wallet?
faq.a10: Connecting your wallet within the game using official TON Connect protocols is standard practice. It can verify on-chain ownership for optional features, such as syncing scores or potential community rewards. The app cannot execute transactions without your explicit wallet approval.

footer.brandDescription: An anime-themed GameFi community token built openly on the TON Blockchain.
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This site is for entertainment and informational purposes only and does not provide financial, investment, legal, or tax advice. $TSUN is a utility/meme token with no intrinsic value; no guarantees of rewards, price appreciation, or game functionality are made. Renounced contracts and liquidity locks reduce admin control but do not eliminate risks of bugs, exploits, or total loss. Cryptocurrency is highly volatile. In-game points have no monetary value. Must be 18+.
footer.rights: © 2026 Tsun On TON. Publicly Verifiable Contract. All rights reserved.

cookie.notice: We use essential cookies for core functionality only. No tracking or advertising cookies. For more details, refer to our Cookie Policy.

riskModal.title: ⚠️ Risk Warning
riskModal.body: Cryptocurrency investments carry high risk. Prices can be volatile and you could lose all your money. Please ensure you understand the risks before proceeding.
